creator: markhannon@optusnet.com.au
text:
The mplayer menu entry under gnome does not display an mplayer icon.

Fix: 

Update the  DESKTOP_ENTRIES= line in the Makefile as follows:

	"MPlayer" "High performance media player" \  "/usr/local/share/mplayer/skins/Blue/icons/icon32x32.png" \ 
"gmplayer" "" false
